chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1910 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 7026/26. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.05.2026 Dr. Tariq Masood, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Rizwan Saeed, Advocate for the Respondent / Department. ---------- The grievance of the Petitioner is that various Appeals preferred by it, (Memos of which have been filed as Annexures “B” to “B-25” pages 51 to 109 of the Court file) remain pending before the Appellate Tribunal along with related stay applications, which have not been fixed for hearing, and in the absence of such hearing, the Petitioner remains exposed to the potential prejudice of recovery being effected without the Petitioner having been afforded a proper opportunity of having been heard. He submits that Petitioner will proceed and advance his case before the Tribunal, but seeks that no coercive action be taken until at least such time the pending stay applications are heard and decided. Learned counsel for the department opposes such request. Be that as it may, since the Petitioner ought to have the benefit of at least one independent adjudication before recovery being affected, the Petition stands disposed of with the directions that no coercive action ought to be taken against the Petitioner pursuant to an Order under Appeal before the Tribunal, as aforementioned, pending decision of the related stay application. Judge Judge Ayaz
